title: Minecraft Bronze
description: Journey, Venture, Quest, Explore, Uncover Treasure! Ride Beasts! Slay Titans! Make Friends? Take them with you! Take your BASE with you!
body:
![Cover Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1ce0953c1d27aab9998a604026076e8f7c6ce2d.png)

Minecraft Bronze expands upon the Minecraft universe, offering all the great adventures and fantasies players have longed for! Inspired by the adventurous classics like Terraria, Cubeworld, and Zelda, as well as the idea of an ultimate DLC or Expansion to Minecraft, bringing timeless adventures such as the classic Aether and Twilight Forest! Introducing enchanted realms and mythical creatures waiting to be encountered, forge bonds with creatures that can accompany you on your travels, and transport them with humane-sized cage traps. With its beautiful fantasy landscapes, Minecraft Bronze promises endless exploration and adventure! Chase on your never ending journey into Minecraft's Bronze Sunsets!

Main mods:

Transport and Storage:
- Carts
- Backpacks
- Gliders
- Grappling Hook
- Cloud Storage
- Ships
- Immersive Aircraft
- Valkyrien Skies
- Eureka
- Clockwork
- Create Trains

Mount mods:
- Gamma Creatures
- Roost
- Animalistic
- Mythic Mounts

Pet mods:
- Hash Falcons
- Splat
- Ylf
- Caracal
- Tameable Beasts

Fauna mods:
- Alex's Mobs
- Ecologics
- Naturalist
- Untamed WIlds
- Critters n' Crawlers
- Wildlife

Friends:
- Kobolds
- Orcs
- Goblins
- Neighborly Folk
- Gnumus
- Plenty of Golems
- Critters and Companions

Foes:

- Born in CHaos
- Galosphere
- Luminous
- Sons of Sins
- Ender's Cataclysm
- Sanguine
- Ice and Fire
- Legendary Monsters
- Crawlers n' Critters

Dimensions

- Aether
- The Undergarden
- Twilight Forest
- The Midnight
- Blue Skies
- Ad Astra!
